title: Program Kanban Board
description: Per-program Jira-aligned kanban board stored at data/[program]/kanban.yaml. Cards use Jira issue types, priorities, and workflow statuses for zero-translation sync when a Jira MCP is available. The file is the canonical source of truth; dashboards read from it, never write to it.

schema_version.description: Schema version — increment when breaking changes are made

program.description: Program slug matching the runs/ directory name

board_name.description: Human-readable board title, e.g. 'FedRAMP High — Project Board'

updated_at.description: ISO date of the last write to this file

jira_project_key.description: Jira project key (e.g. 'FEDRAMP'). Null until a Jira project exists. When set, the project-manager agent routes create/update operations to Jira MCP instead of writing YAML directly.

jira_board_id.description: Jira board ID for sprint sync. Null until synced.

sprints.description: Ordered list of sprints. Active sprint is the first entry with end date >= today.

columns.description: Ordered kanban columns. Must include at least 'backlog' and 'done'. Column IDs map to Jira workflow status names.

cards.description: All cards on this board, across all columns and sprints.

jira_sprint_id.description: Jira sprint ID for sync. Null until synced.

id.description: Column identifier — maps to Jira workflow status

name.description: Display name shown in the board UI

wip_limit.description: Work-in-progress limit. Null means no limit.

id.description: Local card ID, e.g. 'PM-001'. Unique within this board. Never reused after deletion.

jira_key.description: Jira issue key, e.g. 'FEDRAMP-42'. Null until synced to Jira. When set, the project-manager agent uses this as the canonical ID for all Jira operations.

type.description: Jira issue type. Epics are parent containers; subtasks must have a parent_id.

title.description: Card title — maps to Jira Summary field

description.description: Full description — maps to Jira Description field

acceptance_criteria.description: Checklist of done conditions. Maps to Jira Acceptance Criteria field or appended to Description.

column.description: Current column — maps to Jira workflow status

priority.description: Maps to Jira Priority field. 'critical' maps to Jira 'Highest'.

assignee.description: Assignee name or username. Maps to Jira Assignee.

reporter.description: Reporter name or username. Maps to Jira Reporter.

labels.description: Free-form labels. Maps to Jira Labels field.

components.description: Component names. Maps to Jira Components field.

sprint.description: Sprint ID from sprints[]. Null means unscheduled (backlog). Maps to Jira Sprint field.

story_points.description: Story point estimate. Maps to Jira Story Points / Story point estimate field.

due.description: Due date. Maps to Jira Due date field.

parent_id.description: Local card ID of the parent epic or story. Required for subtasks.

depends_on.description: Local card IDs this card is blocked by (logical dependency, not a blocker condition).

blocked_by.description: Free-text description of what is blocking progress. Must be set when column is 'blocked'. Null otherwise.

progress_notes.description: Append-only log of progress updates. Never edited — only appended.

linked_controls.description: Compliance control IDs this card relates to, e.g. ['AC-2', 'AC-3']. Used to cross-reference with run JSON control_coverage.

evidence_window_id.description: ID of a calendar evidence window this card tracks. Links to data/[program]/[date]-calendar.ics events.

poam_id.description: POA&M or GRC item ID from the run JSON, e.g. 'ID-18'. Links this card to the formal tracking record.

fix_version.description: Target release or audit window, e.g. 'Q2-2026-ATO'. Maps to Jira Fix Version/s.

epic_link.description: Local ID or jira_key of the parent epic. For Jira CSV import compatibility.

note.description: Short update — what happened, what changed, what's next
